title: SSA-LULC Systematic Review Pipeline: Code and Computational Methods
description: Computational pipeline (Python) for the systematic review of land use and land cover (LULC) classification methodologies in Sub-Saharan Africa (1991-2026). Includes automated BibTeX deduplication (Levenshtein/RapidFuzz), REGEX-based bibliometric screening, Cochran sampling for REGEX audit, OLS meta-regression with logit-transformed Overall Accuracy, HC3 robust standard errors, bootstrap confidence intervals (B=5000), Cook's Distance influence analysis, Fisher's exact test, and manuscript figure generation. Accompanies the manuscript submitted to Remote Sensing of Environment (Elsevier). Data available separately at Zenodo (see related identifiers).

creators.name: Noris, Francisco José

creators.affiliation: National Service for Industrial Training (SENAI) — São Paulo, Brazil

notes: This repository contains only code. The data (extraction matrix, supplementary tables, protocol) are deposited separately at Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20701518; CC-BY 4.0) and OSF (https://osf.io/cg8wp/). Verified reproducibility: running src/04_meta_regression.py with dados_LIMPOS_metaregressao.xlsx produces R²=0.0523, F(5,149)=1.6430, p_MLC=0.0245 — values reported in Table 2 of the manuscript.
